entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary crop for which a growth and development simulation model is being suggested.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop with growth and development processes similar to pearl millet.

entities.name: SORGF
entities.description: An existing simulation model for sorghum used as a basis for adapting subroutines for pearl millet.

entities.name: SIMULATION MODELING
entities.description: An effective approach to integrating various processes involved in crop growth and development.

entities.name: PHYSICAL ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: Factors that determine crop duration, water availability, pests, diseases, and ultimate yield.

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: A factor of the physical environment that influences crop yield.

entities.name: PESTS AND DISEASES
entities.description: Biological factors influenced by the physical environment that affect crop yield.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The ultimate agricultural output of the crop, determined by environmental factors.

entities.name: CROP DURATION
entities.description: The length of the crop's growth cycle, determined by the physical environment.

entities.name: GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological processes of the crop that are the subject of simulation modeling.

entities.name: TILLERING HABIT
entities.description: A specific growth characteristic of pearl millet that is difficult to model.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental factor that affects the duration of growth stages and tillering habit.

entities.name: DAYLENGTH
entities.description: An environmental factor that affects the duration of growth stages and tillering habit.

entities.name: GROWTH STAGES
entities.description: Phases of crop development whose duration is influenced by temperature and daylength.

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: The accumulated biomass of the plant computed from light interception.

entities.name: LIGHT INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The amount of light intercepted by the canopy, used to compute total dry matter.

entities.name: PARTITIONING OF DRY MATTER
entities.description: The distribution of accumulated dry matter to different plant parts.
